items.name: desiderio-shadcn-theme
items.title: Desiderio shadcn Theme
items.description: TYPO3-ready shadcn/ui token files, Tailwind v4 source, and Site Settings for Desiderio content elements.
items.docs: Install this item only into a TYPO3 extension that follows the Desiderio Content Blocks structure. Raw preset color values belong in shadcn-theme.css; templates, icons, and JavaScript consume semantic shadcn variables.

items.name: desiderio-content-element-runtime
items.title: Desiderio Content Element Runtime
items.description: Shared TYPO3 include assets for shadcn-styled Desiderio content elements.
items.docs: Content element templates pass data through data-* attributes. JavaScript lives in shared include files and initializes idempotently; do not add inline scripts to Fluid templates.
